case_title: ATLANTIC CREDIT AND FINANCE INC VS. TOAN M PHAM et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ATLANTIC CREDIT AND FINANCE INC AS TO DEFENDANT PHAM, TOAN M DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-29-2009
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF ATLANTIC CREDIT AND FINANCE INC
DECLARATION RE: CCP 1033(B) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ATLANTIC CREDIT AND FINANCE INC
NOTICE OF ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF ATLANTIC CREDIT AND FINANCE INC
DECLARATION OF VIJAY S. DESAI RE: INTEREST FILED BY PLAINTIFF ATLANTIC CREDIT AND FINANCE INC

NOT FOUND PROOF OF SERVICE: SUMMONS; COMPLAINT; CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET; DECALRATION PURSUANT TO CCP 395(B); VENUE FOR PERSONAL FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF ATLANTIC CREDIT AND FINANCE INC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-26-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ATLANTIC CREDIT AND FINANCE INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PHAM, TOAN M $2,637.33 PRINCIPAL, $560.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $497.84 INTEREST, $319.94 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,015.11, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ATLANTIC CREDIT AND FINANCE INC SERVED JUL-02-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PHAM, TOAN M
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-26-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 395(B): VENUE FOR PERSONAL, FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF ATLANTIC CREDIT AND FINANCE INC
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $319.94 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT PHAM, TOAN M
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
